prediction.reasoning: BlackRock (BLK) is a large-cap financial stock with moderate volatility. Based on historical price movements, BLK typically exhibits weekly volatility around 3-4%. The prediction assumes normal market conditions with no major macroeconomic shocks. The slight upward bias reflects the general long-term growth trend of asset management companies, though near-term movements are largely random. Confidence intervals are constructed using estimated weekly standard deviation of approximately 2.8% based on typical large-cap financial stock behavior.
